title: Vercel
verdict: Best overall for Next.js & React frameworks. Seamless DX.
description: Vercel is the ultimate frontend cloud platform, designed specifically to optimize build speed and performance for modern frameworks like Next.js, Nuxt, and Astro. It offers serverless deployment, global CDN, analytics, and collaborative preview comments out of the box.
pros: Industry-leading Developer Experience (DX) with Git integration
Fast global edge network with instant cache invalidation
Support for dynamic edge routing and serverless functions
Automatic SEO optimization features (Image optimization, script tags)
cons: Bandwidth overage fees can be expensive on high-traffic sites
Pro plan is $20 per seat, which can add up for larger teams

title: Netlify
verdict: Excellent choice for JAMstack blogs and custom forms.
description: Netlify is a pioneer of the JAMstack movement. It provides developers with seamless Git-based build pipelines, serverless functions, form submission processing, split testing, and a highly customizable user dashboard. It's an excellent multi-framework hosting choice.
pros: Built-in forms and user authentication databases
Split testing allows running A/B experiments natively at the CDN level
Netlify Connect offers excellent headless database integrations
cons: Deploy times can sometimes be slower compared to competitors
Serverless execution limits are tighter on the free tier

title: Cloudflare Pages
verdict: Best value for static sites with global edge network.
description: Cloudflare Pages integrates directly with Git to build and host static websites. Powered by Cloudflare's massive global network spanning 300+ cities, it offers unrivaled speed, security, and uptime. The free plan is incredibly generous, offering unlimited bandwidth.
pros: Absolutely unlimited free bandwidth and build minutes
World-class DDoS security and web application firewall (WAF)
Deep integration with Cloudflare Workers and KV databases
cons: Web dashboard is geared towards network engineers, which can feel complex
Build setup configuration has a steeper learning curve for beginners
